name: Python Programming
description: Python coding proficiency curriculum from basics to advanced patterns

levels.label: Junior Coder
levels.description: Basic syntax, variables, simple functions, loops, lists

levels.label: Mid Coder
levels.description: OOP concepts, dictionaries, file handling, exception handling, list comprehensions

levels.label: Senior Coder
levels.description: Advanced patterns, decorators, generators, context managers, async programming

levels.label: Expert Coder
levels.description: Metaclasses, descriptors, advanced OOP, performance optimization, testing patterns
